  • Uses of MessageI in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components

    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components that return MessageI
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MessageI
    FullClient.waitForNextMessage(String channel)
    Bloque jusqu'à la réception d'un message sur channel (sans timeout).
    MessageI
    FullClient.waitForNextMessage(String channel, Duration d)
    Bloque jusqu'à la réception d'un message sur channel ou expiration du délai (CDC §3.5.3).
    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components that return types with arguments of type MessageI
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Future<MessageI>
    FullClient.getNextMessage(String channel)
    API de réception avancée non bloquante (CDC §3.5.3) : retourne un Future qui sera complété à l'arrivée du prochain message sur channel.
    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components with parameters of type MessageI
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Broker.asyncPublishAndNotify(String publisherReceptionPortURI, String channel, MessageI message, String notificationInbounhdPortURI)
    Async publish with optional notification (CDC §3.4 + Audit 2).
    protected void
    Broker.deliverToTargets(String channel, MessageI message, List<Broker.DeliveryTarget> targets)
    Submit one delivery task per pre-built target, decrementing the channel's in-flight counter when the last delivery completes.
    void
    AbstractPluginComponent.onReceive(String channel, MessageI message)
    Default reception callback wired into the subscription plugin.
    void
    FullClient.onReceive(String channel, MessageI message)
    Hook de réception délégué au ClientSubscriptionPlugin ; trace et logue le message reçu.
    void
    PluginClient.onReceive(String channel, MessageI message)
    Callback de réception câblé dans le ClientSubscriptionPlugin.
    void
    ScenarioPluginClient.onReceive(String channel, MessageI message)
    Surcharge du hook onReceive de PluginClient qui ajoute une trace console préfixée [MidSemScenario][RECEIVE] pour rendre les livraisons visibles pendant la démo.
    void
    SubscriberClient.onReceive(String channel, MessageI message)
    Hook de réception (passé en MessageDeliveryHandler au ClientSubscriptionPlugin).
    protected void
    Broker.propagationStage(String channel, MessageI message)
    Étape de propagation (cf.
    void
    Broker.publish(String publisherReceptionPortURI, String channel, MessageI message)
    Asynchronous publish (CDC §3.4 / Audit 2).
    void
    Client.publish(String channel, MessageI message)
    Publie message sur channel (livraison asynchrone).
    void
    FullClient.publish(String channel, MessageI message)
    Publie un message sur le canal donné.
    void
    PluginClient.publish(String channel, MessageI message)
    Publie message sur channel (livraison asynchrone).
    void
    PrivilegedClient.publish(String channel, MessageI message)
    Publie un message sur le canal donné via le port PrivilegedClientCI.
    void
    PublisherClient.publish(String channel, MessageI message)
    Publie un message unique sur le canal donné.
    void
    Client.receive(String channel, MessageI message)
    Callback de livraison appelé par ClientInboundPort pour chaque message reçu (mode unitaire).
    void
    Client.receive(String channel, MessageI[] messages)
    Callback de livraison en mode lot : par défaut, délègue à la version unitaire pour chaque message non nul.
    protected void
    Broker.receptionStage(String publisherReceptionPortURI, String channel, MessageI message, String notificationInboundPortURI)
    Étape de réception du pipeline (cf.
    protected void
    Broker.submitPublish(String publisherReceptionPortURI, String channel, MessageI message, String notificationInboundPortURI)
    Soumet la première étape (réception) du pipeline asynchrone sur l'executor Broker.esReceptionIndex.
    Method parameters in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components with type arguments of type MessageI
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Broker.asyncPublishAndNotify(String publisherReceptionPortURI, String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages, String notificationInbounhdPortURI)
    Bulk async publish with optional notification.
    protected void
    Broker.bulkSubmit(String publisherReceptionPortURI, String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages, String notificationInboundPortURI)
    Bulk reception path used by Broker.publish(String, String, ArrayList) and the bulk overload of Broker.asyncPublishAndNotify(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.interfaces.MessageI, java.lang.String).
    void
    Broker.publish(String publisherReceptionPortURI, String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages)
    Bulk publish: like Broker.publish(String, String, MessageI) but for a non-empty list of messages.
    void
    PublisherClient.publish(String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages)
    Publie un lot de messages sur le canal donné.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BrokerPublishingInboundPort.asyncPublishAndNotify(String receptionPortURI, String channel, MessageI message, String notificationInbounhdPortURI)

    BrokerReceptionOutboundPort.receive(String channel, MessageI[] messages)
     
    void
    ClientInboundPort.receive(String channel, MessageI message)
    Réception d'un message unitaire — dispatché en asynchrone sur le client (ou son plugin) pour éviter de bloquer la thread RMI / l'executor de livraison du broker.
    void
    ClientInboundPort.receive(String channel, MessageI[] messages)
    Réception d'un lot de messages — itère et délègue à la version unitaire pour bénéficier du dispatch asynchrone par message.
    Method parameters in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.ports with type arguments of type MessageI

  • Uses of MessageI in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.interfaces

    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.interfaces that return MessageI
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MessageI
    MessageI.copy()
    copy the message i.e., make a deep copy of the message up to the properties values and the payload that is not copied but simply referenced by the new message.
    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.interfaces with parameters of type MessageI
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    PublishingCI.asyncPublishAndNotify(String receptionPortURI, String channel, MessageI message, String notificationInbounhdPortURI)
    asynchronously publish message on channel and notify the client component if an abnormal termination condition occurred.
    boolean
    MessageFilterI.match(MessageI message)
    return true if message is accepted by this filter, otherwise false.
    void
    ReceivingI.onReceive(String channel, MessageI message)
    Called when a message is delivered on a channel the client is subscribed to.
    default void
    ReceivingI.onReceive(String channel, MessageI[] messages)
    Called when a batch of messages is delivered on a channel the client is subscribed to.
    void
    PublishingCI.publish(String receptionPortURI, String channel, MessageI message)
    asynchronously publish message on channel.
    void
    ReceivingCI.receive(String channel, MessageI message)
    receive message from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.
    void
    ReceivingCI.receive(String channel, MessageI[] messages)
    receive messages from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.
    Method parameters in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.interfaces with type arguments of type MessageI
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    PublishingCI.asyncPublishAndNotify(String receptionPortURI, String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages, String notificationInbounhdPortURI)
    asynchronously publish all of the messages on channel and notify the client component if an abnormal termination condition occurred.
    void
    PublishingCI.publish(String receptionPortURI, String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages)
    asynchronously publish all of the messages on channel.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Message
    La classe Message implémente MessageI comme représentation concrète des messages échangés via le système de publication/souscription.

  • Uses of MessageI in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.plugins

    Fields in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.plugins with type parameters of type MessageI
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected final Map<String,CompletableFuture<MessageI>>
    ClientSubscriptionPlugin.nextMessageFutures
    Per-channel next-message future to complete when a message arrives.
    protected final Map<String,LinkedBlockingQueue<MessageI>>
    ClientSubscriptionPlugin.pendingMessages
    Per-channel FIFO of received messages not yet consumed by advanced calls.
    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.plugins that return MessageI
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MessageI
    ClientSubscriptionI.waitForNextMessage(String channel)
    wait for the next message received from channel, the caller thread being blocked until such a message is delivered from channel.
    MessageI
    ClientSubscriptionI.waitForNextMessage(String channel, Duration d)
    wait for the next message received from channel, the caller thread being blocked for a maximum duration d, returning null if no message has been received during the next d period of time.
    MessageI
    ClientSubscriptionPlugin.waitForNextMessage(String channel)
    Bloque le thread appelant jusqu'à l'arrivée du prochain message sur channel.
    MessageI
    ClientSubscriptionPlugin.waitForNextMessage(String channel, Duration d)
    Variante avec délai maximal : bloque jusqu'à l'arrivée du prochain message sur channel ou expiration de d.
    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.plugins that return types with arguments of type MessageI
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Future<MessageI>
    ClientSubscriptionI.getNextMessage(String channel)
    get a future on the next message received from channel.
    Future<MessageI>
    ClientSubscriptionPlugin.getNextMessage(String channel)
    Retourne un Future (concrètement un CompletableFuture) résolu au prochain message disponible sur channel.
    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.plugins with parameters of type MessageI
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ClientPublicationI.asyncPublishAndNotify(String channel, MessageI message)
    asynchronously publish message on channel.
    void
    ClientPublicationPlugin.asyncPublishAndNotify(String channel, MessageI message)
    Soumet la publication via runTask sur l'un des executors du composant propriétaire pour ne pas bloquer le thread appelant.
    void
    ClientPrivilegedPlugin.publish(String channel, MessageI message)
    Publie un message via le port privilégié (utile pour les classes de service qui n'installent pas le greffon de publication).
    void
    ClientPublicationI.publish(String channel, MessageI message)
    asynchronously publish message on channel.
    void
    ClientPublicationPlugin.publish(String channel, MessageI message)
    Publie message sur channel via le port outbound PublishingCI possédé par ce greffon.
    void
    ClientRegistrationPlugin.receive(String channel, MessageI message)
    Point d'entrée invoqué par le port ClientInboundPort de ce greffon lors de la livraison d'un message par le broker.
    void
    ClientRegistrationPlugin.receive(String channel, MessageI[] messages)
    Variante batch invoquée par ClientInboundPort.receive(String, MessageI[]).
    void
    ClientSubscriptionI.receive(String channel, MessageI message)
    receive passively message from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.
    void
    ClientSubscriptionI.receive(String channel, MessageI[] messages)
    receive passively messages from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.
    void
    ClientSubscriptionPlugin.receive(String channel, MessageI message)
    Point d'entrée appelé par le ClientRegistrationPlugin (qui possède le port ReceivingCI) lorsqu'un message arrive.
    void
    ClientSubscriptionPlugin.receive(String channel, MessageI[] messages)
    Variante batch de ClientSubscriptionPlugin.receive(String, MessageI) : itère sur le tableau et appelle receive(channel, m) pour chaque message non null.
    Method parameters in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.plugins with type arguments of type MessageI
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ClientPublicationI.asyncPublishAndNotify(String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages)
    asynchronously publish all of the messages on channel.
    void
    ClientPublicationPlugin.asyncPublishAndNotify(String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages)
    Variante batch de ClientPublicationPlugin.asyncPublishAndNotify(String, MessageI).
    void
    ClientPrivilegedPlugin.publish(String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages)
    Variante batch de ClientPrivilegedPlugin.publish(String, MessageI), via le port privilégié.
    void
    ClientPublicationI.publish(String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages)
    asynchronously publish all of the messages on channel.
    void
    ClientPublicationPlugin.publish(String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages)

Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa — Sorbonne Université, 2026
